The lines in `src/query/index.rs` are only in comments. Now let me compile the final list from repo source files (excluding `.venv`), excluding:
- `src/parser/treesitter.rs` line 13 which is the `fn parse_file` definition — but line 271 is a real call site, so it stays.
- `src/query/index.rs` — only comment lines, exclude it.

The files with actual call sites are:
- `src/index.rs` — calls `crate::parser::treesitter::parse_file(`
- `src/parser/c_lang.rs` — calls `parse_file(`
- `src/parser/cpp.rs` — calls `parse_file(`
- `src/parser/csharp.rs` — calls `parse_file(`
- `src/parser/go.rs` — calls `parse_file(`
- `src/parser/java.rs` — calls `parse_file(`
- `src/parser/javascript.rs` — calls `parse_file(`
- `src/parser/python.rs` — calls `parse_file(`
- `src/parser/ruby.rs` — calls `parse_file(`
- `src/parser/rust_lang.rs` — calls `parse_file(`
- `src/parser/treesitter.rs` — line 271 is a call (not the definition on line 13)
- `src/parser/typescript.rs` — calls `parse_file(`

  "src/index.rs",
